description_long: This is a futuristic, stylized airplane with a predominantly white and orange color scheme, featuring a sleek, aerodynamic body and wide, sharply angled wings. The wings are mid-mounted and have a distinctive swept-back design with textured orange tips, giving the aircraft a dynamic appearance. The fuselage is compact, with a pointed nose and a cockpit area highlighted by blue-tinted windows, suggesting a single-seat configuration. The rear of the airplane features a unique tail section with a central vertical stabilizer and two engine nacelles mounted underneath. The surface shows some wear and scuff marks, indicating use or exposure to urban environments. The overall design is modern and sporty, likely intended for high-speed travel or racing scenarios.
description: A sleek, white and orange futuristic airplane with swept-back mid-mounted wings, a pointed nose, and a compact single-seat cockpit. The design features a unique tail and dual rear engines, with visible wear on the surface.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the wide, swept-back wings, pointed nose, and blue-tinted cockpit windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the aerodynamic profile, mid-mounted wings, and the rear engine nacelles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the unique tail configuration, dual engine outlets, and the broad wingspan.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the wing shape, cockpit placement, and the detailed tail section.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with swept-back wings and pronounced dihedral angle; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin rear-mounted jet engines integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Single vertical stabilizer with a conventional tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear; likely retractable or omitted in this depiction.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a blue-tinted canopy.
